details.reasoning: Implementation fully meets all rubric requirements: (1) Stats(StatsArgs) variant and struct with human bool flag added to CacheCommand; (2) Command iterates over CacheBucket::iter() and uses DiskUsage::new() with count_ignoring_errors(); (3) Function is pub(crate) fn cache_stats returning Result<ExitStatus> with ExitStatus::Success; (4) --human flag implemented with human_readable_bytes for formatted output; (5) Output includes per-bucket lines (Wheels, Source Distributions, etc.) and a Total line; (6) Module registered in commands/mod.rs with proper pub(crate) use export; (7) Dispatch wiring in lib.rs correctly matches CacheCommand::Stats and calls commands::cache_stats; (8) Code follows same patterns as cache_size command including printer usage, preview feature integration, and function signature. Additionally: display_name() helper method added to CacheBucket, CacheStats preview feature integrated correctly, comprehensive test coverage with four test cases (empty raw, empty human, with packages raw, with packages human), and test utilities properly added to support testing.
